scholarships.name: 45% Constitutional Reserved Quota
scholarships.coverage: Full fee waiver / Partial depending on category
scholarships.application: Declare category at university/college admission; provide caste/category certificate
scholarships.website: Applied via each university admission portal

scholarships.name: IOE Merit Scholarship
scholarships.programs_covered: BE (all branches) at TU-IOE constituent campuses
scholarships.seats: Up to 25% of regular students per campus
scholarships.coverage: Full or Partial tuition fee waiver

eligibility.min_qualification: Top rank in IOE Entrance Exam

scholarships.selection_method: Automatic based on IOE entrance exam rank
scholarships.application: No separate application; rank determines award

scholarships.name: KU Need-Based Scholarship

eligibility.min_qualification: Admitted to KU; CGPA 3.3+ to continue

scholarships.application: Submit Financial Aid Form at admission; KU Admission & Exam Committee decides

scholarships.name: Pokhara University Bachelor Scholarships
scholarships.programs_covered: BE, BBA, BCA, BHM, BIT, BCIS, BDevStudies, Humanities

eligibility.min_qualification: Passed +2 with minimum marks; pass PU scholarship written exam

scholarships.selection_method: Written exam (3 hours, subjective) at PU Academic Complex, Pokhara; ~July-August annually
scholarships.application: Online at scholarship.pu.edu.np; application window July-August

scholarships.name: Government MBBS/BDS/BSc Nursing Scholarship (MECEE-BL)
scholarships.provider: Government of Nepal / Medical Education Commission (MEC)
scholarships.seats: 691 MBBS + BDS + Nursing govt seats nationwide
scholarships.application: Apply via MEC portal; sit MECEE-BL entrance exam; medportal.mec.edu.np

scholarships.name: UGC Nepal Scholarship
scholarships.application: Apply via UGC portal; deadline ~March annually

scholarships.name: MOEST Bilateral Government Scholarship
scholarships.provider: Ministry of Education, Science & Technology Nepal
scholarships.programs_covered: Various programs in China, India, Bangladesh, Russia, Pakistan, Japan, Cuba, and more
scholarships.application: Apply via MOEST; country-specific annual cycles

scholarships.name: TU Community School Mandatory Scholarship
scholarships.programs_covered: BBA, BBS at all TU affiliated colleges

eligibility.min_qualification: Completed SEE from community school; passed CMAT

scholarships.selection_method: CMAT score + community school SEE certificate
scholarships.application: Declare eligibility at TU-affiliated college admission time

scholarships.name: PAHS Rural Bonding Scholarship

eligibility.min_qualification: Pass MECEE-BL; willing to sign rural service bond (5+ years in rural Nepal post-graduation)

scholarships.application: Apply via MECEE-BL + PAHS admission process

scholarships.name: KU Geomatics Engineering Government Scholarship

eligibility.min_qualification: Pass KUCAT; rank in Geomatics Engineering

scholarships.selection_method: KUCAT rank within Geomatics Engineering by province

scholarships.name: India Embassy – Mahatma Gandhi Scholarship
scholarships.programs_covered: MBBS, BDS, BAMS, Engineering, BA in India
scholarships.application: Apply via Embassy of India, Kathmandu; annual cycle

scholarships.name: KU Female Engineering Scholarship (Jasutara Memorial / E&T)
scholarships.programs_covered: BE Mechanical Engineering at KU SoE

eligibility.min_qualification: Admitted to KU BE Mechanical Engineering

scholarships.application: Apply through KU School of Engineering at admission
